case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY VS. KEVIN PHILLIP WELCH

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELCH, KEVIN PHILLIP $25,470.67 PRINCIPAL, $24,855.02 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50,355.69, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELCH, KEVIN PHILLIP $10,210.29 PRINCIPAL, $14,987.88 INTEREST, $272.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,470.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
